name: C2xRegisterCallback
title: C2xRegisterCallback
syntax: long C2xRegisterCallback(long callbackType, char* callbackFunction, char* dbMessage);
description: The callback can be registered for all or for a specific message. If the dbMessage parameter is present, the function can be called earliest in the On Start event handler. With multiple calls of this function it is possible to register several callback functions for the same message or to register the same callback function for several messages.

parameters.name: callbackType
parameters.description: 0: Register a Receive Indication callback 1: Register a Pre Transmit Indication callback

parameters.name: dbMessage
parameters.description: Name of a database message for which the callback is invoked.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
